ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item category (e.g., Electronics, Toys) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., New, Used) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the item is stored */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item image */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the item category (e.g., Electronics, Toys) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Austin, Dallas) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item for which the request is made */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action requested (e.g., Request Contact) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., volunteer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date when the donation was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_condition" (
  "item_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item condition record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was recorded */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., New, Used, Damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_condition_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)
